actions.intent: Commit to the lower-left puppy first instead of spreading partial progress across all three targets.
Complete the lower-left rescue route and remove the immediate water-side pressure.
Pivot through the center target next, using the first rescue as the stabilizing beat.
Open the center puppy while also progressing the safer top-right route.
Finish the safest top-right puppy last after the triage order has done its job.
Finish the top-right puppy last after the lower-left and center rescues are secure.

notes: Designer-approved triage path: lower-left, center, then top-right.
